description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Husband: Ṣedaqa b. Shel[omo] (same as in T-S 8J35.12 (PGPID 18633)?). Wife: Malīḥa bt. Berakhot. Written and signed by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Also signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuel the Spaniard. On verso documentation that she received the geṭ, signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe and Maʿālī b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Kohen. AA/ASE. Join: Oded Zinger
tags: get, Isaac b. Samuel ha-Sefaradi, Halfon b. Menashshe
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
